markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Trea Turner records 1+ stolen bases in Philadelphia vs Detroit professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 12, 2026 at 1:40 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Trea Turner is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Trea Turner starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Trea Turner is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Trea Turner is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on stolen bases recorded.
markets.title: Trea Turner: 1+ stolen bases?
